description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define a single job named build (default stage) that runs the commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:alpine-edge -f Dockerfile.alpine-edge ., and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:alpine-edge, and does not use any caches, artifacts, or special rules.
